summary: Tested cross-pollination features: Map→Feed (join session creates check-in post), Payment→Profile (surf streak updates), Booking→Messaging (share link for DMs), gift photo flow, claim free photo, and purchase flow. Backend: 14/15 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: Loads correctly, login works, TaggedPhotoModal has Gift badge and 'Add to My Gallery' button.

minor.issue: Returns 403 if user's role is not a surfer role - test needs proper surfer user

critical_code_review_comments: Cross-pollination features correctly implemented in sessions.py
POST /api/sessions/join creates check-in Post with is_check_in=True and all location fields
surf_streak correctly incremented for consecutive days, reset for non-consecutive
Badge notifications created when milestones (7-day, 30-day, 10 sessions, 50 sessions) are hit
GET /api/bookings/{id}/share-link returns invite_code, share_message, and booking_details
POST /api/ai/gift-photo creates PhotoTag with is_gift=True and sends notification
POST /api/gallery/items/{id}/claim checks access_granted or is_gift before allowing claim
TaggedPhotoModal uses 'Add to My Gallery' button text (not 'Purchase')
TaggedPhotoModal shows Gift badge when photo.is_gift is true

success_rate.frontend: 100% (app loads, login works, UI components verified)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_cross_poll test users and gallery items during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-pollination features work correctly. Key verified flows: 1) sessions/join creates check-in posts and updates surf_streak 2) bookings share-link returns DM invite data 3) ai/gift-photo creates gifted photo tag 4) gallery/items/claim allows free photo claiming. Frontend TaggedPhotoModal correctly shows Gift badge and 'Add to My Gallery' text.

backend: POST /api/sessions/join - Creates check_in post and updates surf_streak (PASSED)

POST /api/ai/gift-photo - Gifts photo to surfer with notification (PASSED)
POST /api/gallery/items/{id}/claim - Claims free photo for eligible users (PASSED)
All API endpoints exist and respond correctly (PASSED)
